title: Domestos Power 5 Ocean Toilet Rim Blocks toilet freshener with a long-lasting fragrance clean and freshen for up to 300 flushes 5x 50 g
features: Domestos Power 5 Ocean Toilet Rim Block leaves your toilet fresh and clean for up to 300 flushes
This toilet block leaves a long-lasting ocean fragrance in your bathroom
Domestos Power 5 toilet rim blocks offer five powerful benefits in one: hygiene, long-lasting fragrance, limescale prevention, rich foam and a shiny toilet
Our powerful toilet freshener tackles dirt and limescale
Our Ocean toilet rim blocks pair well with Domestos Original Thick Bleach for a germ-free, fresh-scented, sparkling clean toilet
By choosing Domestos toilet cleaners and fresheners, you support our global initiative against poor sanitation, helping families worldwide gain access to clean and safe toilets
description: Product Description Struggling to keep your toilet smelling good and looking clean? Discover the Domestos Power 5 Ocean Toilet Rim Block, your solution to a clean and fresh toilet flush after flush. It features a long-lasting fragrance that lasts up to 300 flushes. This powerful toilet freshener provides you with not 1 but 5 key benefits: 1. Hygenically clean 2. Long lasting fragrance 3. Limescale prevention 4. Rich foam 5. Shine How to use: Simply unfold the hanger, break the plastic lock and hang over the toilet rim ensuring it’s in the flow of water. Use Domestos toilet cleaner and Power 5 block together for an unstoppable germ-free, fresh-scented, sparkling clean toilet. Our toilet rim blocks are also available in Lime, Magnolia and Lavender. Domestos is the UK’s #1 toilet cleaner brand*, renowned for protecting families against germs and committed to combatting poor sanitation worldwide, helping millions of people gain access to clean and safe toilets. Support our work by expanding your cleaning arsenal with Domestos products. Enhance your cleaning routine with the full Domestos range: Bleach, Power Foam, and Power Fresh for a sparkling clean bathroom. *2023 NIQ data, Value / Unit Sales, Household Cleaning – Toilet & Bleach w/e 04.11.2023 Ingredients >30%: Anionic surfactants. <5%: Non-ionic surfactants, Perfume, Phosphates, Aromatic hydrocarbons, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Citral, Limonene, Linalool. Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever UK Ltd, Springfield Drive, Leatherhead, KT22 7GR Unilever Ireland Ltd, 20 Riverwalk, National Digital Park, Citywest, Dublin 24, Ireland See more
